text: 我的身体……越来越不对劲了。
column5: #texten:My body... something is getting more and more wrong.

text: 不是累，也不是空气的问题。
column5: #texten:It's not fatigue, and it's not the air.

text: 我觉得我病了。而且一直在加重。
column5: #texten:I think I'm sick. And it keeps getting worse.

text: §Ø_∆.µΩ不是不回来。是时间过得不一样。
column5: #texten:§Ø_∆.µΩ didn't refuse to come back. Time just moved differently.

text: 对§Ø_∆.µΩ来说只有几年……对我们来说是几十年……
column5: #texten:For §Ø_∆.µΩ it was only a few years... for us it was decades...

text: 这里的灯全灭了，能源几乎没有了。我却好好的。
column5: #texten:All the lights here are dead, barely any energy left. And I'm perfectly fine.

text: §Ø_∆.µΩ来的时候灯全亮着……难道是这里的能源在伤害§Ø_∆.µΩ？
column5: #texten:When §Ø_∆.µΩ came all the lights were on... could the energy here be hurting §Ø_∆.µΩ?
